title: Monsoon Wrap
description: A Chinese-inspired dish using Monsoon and a wrap. Quick, easy, and delicious.
instructions: 1. Heat a pan over medium heat.
2. Add Monsoon to the pan and cook for 2 minutes.
3. Add xeridic, brazilian, and beans to the pan and stir-fry for 3 minutes.
4. Warm the wrap by wrapping it in a damp paper towel and microwaving for 10-15 seconds.
5. Assemble the wrap by spooning the Monsoon mixture into the center of the wrap.
